response.justification: Candidate has ~15 years of solid full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, GIS, ad-tech, fintech), with demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, open-source founding). However, the role is a Director-level IC focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows only minimal, recent AI exposure (some MCP/agentic tooling work at current role since April 2025). There is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, AI-powered products at scale, cloud platform strategy leadership, or advising strategic customers — all core to this role. Experience is primarily senior IC delivery rather than principal/strategy-level influence.
strengths: ~15 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source contributions, founded GISCollective
Recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic workflow tooling shows initial AI-infrastructure engagement
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise — no shipped AI products, ML systems, or recognized AI work
No evidence of Principal/Director-level strategic influence, customer advisory, or cross-org technical leadership
Limited cloud-platform strategy experience; cloud work appears tactical (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deploys) rather than architectural/strategic

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI expertise and AI-built products
No evidence of Principal-level strategy or customer-advisory scope
Long track record of hands-on engineering across diverse stacks
